prompt: Create a moody photorealistic 35mm film photograph of a small Norwegian fjord fishing village at blue hour after rain. The view looks down a wet harbor road toward the water, with glossy asphalt reflecting warm yellow lights. Include exactly 1 parked older silver sedan in the right foreground seen from behind, exactly 1 brightly lit fishing boat at the dock in the center with tall white masts and rigging, exactly 1 tall curved streetlamp on the right, and exactly 6 prominent buildings: a lit shop with a glowing sign on the left foreground, a dark wooden warehouse above it, a small red building near the center-left dock, a red boathouse behind the boat, a white building with red trim on the right foreground, and a dark cropped wooden wall at the far right edge. In the background, place a cold blue fjord and steep dark mountains with patches of snow, partially silhouetted by fading evening light. Use a quiet cinematic documentary style, natural perspective from street level, slightly grainy analog texture, subtle motionless atmosphere, damp surfaces, cool blue color grading contrasted with warm harbor lights, realistic shadows, no people except at most one tiny distant dock worker silhouette. Make the scene feel remote, cold, and lived-in, with high detail but no modern tourist elements. Use dusk blue hour, recent rain, overcast, grainy 1980s Kodak documentary film, and 3:2 landscape.
promptEn: Create a moody photorealistic 35mm film photograph of a small Norwegian fjord fishing village at blue hour after rain. The view looks down a wet harbor road toward the water, with glossy asphalt reflecting warm yellow lights. Include exactly 1 parked older silver sedan in the right foreground seen from behind, exactly 1 brightly lit fishing boat at the dock in the center with tall white masts and rigging, exactly 1 tall curved streetlamp on the right, and exactly 6 prominent buildings: a lit shop with a glowing sign on the left foreground, a dark wooden warehouse above it, a small red building near the center-left dock, a red boathouse behind the boat, a white building with red trim on the right foreground, and a dark cropped wooden wall at the far right edge. In the background, place a cold blue fjord and steep dark mountains with patches of snow, partially silhouetted by fading evening light. Use a quiet cinematic documentary style, natural perspective from street level, slightly grainy analog texture, subtle motionless atmosphere, damp surfaces, cool blue color grading contrasted with warm harbor lights, realistic shadows, no people except at most one tiny distant dock worker silhouette. Make the scene feel remote, cold, and lived-in, with high detail but no modern tourist elements. Use dusk blue hour, recent rain, overcast, grainy 1980s Kodak documentary film, and 3:2 landscape.
promptZh: 创作一张具有电影质感的 35mm 胶片写实摄影作品，场景为雨后蓝调时刻的 挪威峡湾渔村。视角沿湿润的港口道路望向水面，光滑的沥青路面反射着温暖的黄色灯光。画面右侧前景需包含 1 辆从后方拍摄的银色旧轿车，中心码头停泊着 1 艘灯火通明的渔船，配有高耸的白色桅杆和索具，右侧设 1 盏高大的弧形路灯。画面中需包含 6 栋显眼的建筑：左侧前景是一家带有发光招牌的商店，上方是一座深色木质仓库，中心偏左码头附近有一座小型红色建筑，船后方是一座红色船屋，右侧前景是一座带有红色装饰的白色建筑，最右侧边缘为一面深色截断的木墙。背景处为寒冷的蓝色峡湾和陡峭的深色山脉，山间带有积雪，在渐隐的暮色中呈现出半剪影效果。采用安静的电影纪录片风格，保持街道视角的自然透视，带有轻微的胶片颗粒感，营造出静谧潮湿的氛围。冷蓝色调与温暖的港口灯光形成对比，阴影真实，除远处码头可能出现最多 1 个微小的工人剪影外，画面中不应有人物。整体氛围偏远、寒冷且具有生活气息，细节丰富，避免出现现代旅游元素。使用 黄昏蓝调时刻，刚下过雨，阴天，1980 年代柯达纪录片胶片颗粒感 以及 3:2 横向构图。
